question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/record/RecordStreamFileListener.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: onEnd(RecordFile)] Can an unprivileged external user craft a RecordFile with a null consensusStart value to cause a NullPointerException in SyntheticCryptoTransferApprovalMigration.onEnd() when calling recordFileRepositoryProvider.getObject().findLatestBefore(streamFile.getConsensusStart()), bypassing the migration and leaving unauthorized synthetic transfers with incorrect is_approval=false state?
